001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.controlStream;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.controlStream.NonexistentExitFillTubingModeStateStreamRequest;
010
011import java.util.Set;
012import java.util.TreeSet;
013
014/**
015 * Stream message sent by pump while exiting fill tubing mode.
016 *
017 * Transaction ID of this stream message matches the call to ExitFillTubingModeRequest
018 */
019/**
020 * Stream message sent by pump while exiting fill tubing mode.
021 *
022 * Transaction ID of this stream message matches the call to ExitFillTubingModeRequest
023 *
024
025 *
026 * <br>
027 *
028 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.controlStream.NonexistentExitFillTubingModeStateStreamRequest}, opCode -23, size 1
029 *
030 * <br>
031 *
032 * 
033 * <table border='1'>
034 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
035 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-23</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
036 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>1</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
037 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
038 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CONTROL_STREAM}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
039 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.controlStream.NonexistentExitFillTubingModeStateStreamRequest}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
040 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>stream</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>true</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
041 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>signed</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>true</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
042 * </table>
043 */@MessageProps(
044    opCode=-23,
045    size=1,
046    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
047    characteristic=Characteristic.CONTROL_STREAM,
048    request=NonexistentExitFillTubingModeStateStreamRequest.class,
049    stream=true,
050    signed=true
051)
052public class ExitFillTubingModeStateStreamResponse extends Message {
053    
054    private int stateId;
055    private ExitFillTubingModeState state;
056    private boolean isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp;
057    private long stateBitmask;
058    
059    public ExitFillTubingModeStateStreamResponse() {}
060    
061    public ExitFillTubingModeStateStreamResponse(int stateId) {
062        this.cargo = buildCargo(stateId);
063        parse(cargo);
064        
065    }
066
067    public ExitFillTubingModeStateStreamResponse(boolean isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp, long stateBitmask) {
068        this.cargo = buildPumpingCargo(isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp, stateBitmask);
069        parse(cargo);
070    }
071
072    /**
073     * <table border="1">
074     * <caption>Parsed fields for ExitFillTubingModeStateStreamResponse:</caption>
075     * <tr><td><code>stateId</code></td><td><code>raw[0] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
076     * <tr><td><code>state</code></td><td><code>getState()</code></td></tr>
077     * <tr><td><code>isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp</code></td><td><code>raw[0] != 0</code></td></tr>
078     * <tr><td><code>stateBitmask</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 1)</code></td></tr>
079     * </table>
080     */
081    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
082        raw = removeSignedRequestHmacBytes(raw);
083        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == 1 || raw.length == 5);
084        this.cargo = raw;
085        this.stateId = raw[0] & 0xFF;
086        this.state = getState();
087        if (raw.length == 5) {
088            this.isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp = raw[0] != 0;
089            this.stateBitmask = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 1);
090        } else {
091            this.isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp = false;
092            this.stateBitmask = 0;
093        }
094        
095    }
096
097    
098    /**
099     * <table border="1">
100     * <caption>Byte layout for ExitFillTubingModeStateStreamResponse.buildCargo(...):</caption>
101     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
102     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>(byte) state</code></td></tr>
103     * </table>
104     */
105    public static byte[] buildCargo(int state) {
106        return Bytes.combine(
107            new byte[]{ (byte) state });
108    }
109
110    public static byte[] buildPumpingCargo(boolean isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp, long stateBitmask) {
111        return Bytes.combine(
112            new byte[]{ (byte) (isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp ? 1 : 0) },
113            Bytes.toUint32(stateBitmask));
114    }
115    
116    public int getStateId() {
117        return stateId;
118    }
119
120
121    public ExitFillTubingModeState getState() {
122        return ExitFillTubingModeState.fromId(stateId);
123    }
124
125    public boolean getIsPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp() {
126        return isPumpingStateSetAfterStartUp;
127    }
128
129    public long getStateBitmask() {
130        return stateBitmask;
131    }
132
133    public Set<PumpingState> getStates() {
134        return PumpingState.fromBitmask(stateBitmask);
135    }
136
137    public enum PumpingState {
138        IS_DELIVERING_THERAPY(1),
139        CAN_RESUME_THERAPY(2),
140        CAN_AUTO_RESUME(4),
141        BOLUS_ALLOWED(8),
142        TUBING_FILLED(16),
143        DELIVERING_BASAL(32),
144        DELIVERING_BOLUS(64),
145        DELIVERING_NORMAL_BOLUS(128),
146        IS_FILL_TUBING_ALLOWED(256),
147        IS_BASAL_STATE(512),
148        IS_PREP_CARTRIDGE_STATE(1024),
149        IS_LOAD_CARTRIDGE_STATE(2048),
150        IS_FILL_STATE(4096),
151        IS_ESTIMATE_STATE(8192),
152        CARTRIDGE_IS_INSTALLED(16384),
153        CAN_SNOOZE(32768),
154        ;
155
156        private final long mask;
157        PumpingState(long mask) {
158            this.mask = mask;
159        }
160        public long mask() {
161            return mask;
162        }
163        public static Set<PumpingState> fromBitmask(long bitmask) {
164            Set<PumpingState> ret = new TreeSet<>();
165            for (PumpingState s : values()) {
166                if ((bitmask & s.mask()) != 0) {
167                    ret.add(s);
168                }
169            }
170            return ret;
171        }
172        public static int toBitmask(PumpingState...states) {
173            int bitmask = 0;
174            for (PumpingState s : states) {
175                bitmask |= s.mask();
176            }
177            return bitmask;
178        }
179    }
180
181    public enum ExitFillTubingModeState {
182        NOT_COMPLETE(0),
183        TUBING_FILLED(1),
184        ;
185
186        private final int id;
187        ExitFillTubingModeState(int id) {
188            this.id = id;
189        }
190
191
192        public int getId() {
193            return id;
194        }
195
196        public static ExitFillTubingModeState fromId(int id) {
197            for (ExitFillTubingModeState c : values()) {
198                if (c.id == id) return c;
199            }
200            return null;
201        }
202    }
203    
204}
